subcodes.first_line: O wayfarer in the path of God! The first and second letters have been dispatched, and this is the third that is sent forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بادیه پیما در سبیل الهی مکتوبی اول و ثانی و این ثالث است که ارسال میشود
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @growth of the Cause
